07_gpt2_story_en.name: GPT-2 영문 동화 생성
07_gpt2_story_en.story_en:
A children's story.

Once upon a time, there was a children ' s drawing of a tiger and two children standing in front of a door. The main character was children, children are playing with kite in house. The mood was happy.

The story begins:
 "One day when I came to school the teacher asked me what my favourite animal is. My answer that it isn't known for its power nor beauty," said this little boy who just happened at class 1 on his first turn here after getting out of kindergarten without any schooling as well (from those 2 years). But he still wants to become one himself by looking into art books from middle grade onwards."

 - Soham Adnanu

08_nllb_translation_ko.name: NLLB 영한 번역
08_nllb_translation_ko.story_final: 어린이들의 이야기. 한때는 어린이들의 그림으로 호랑이와 두 명의 어린이가 문 앞에 서 있었다. 주인공은 아이들이었고, 아이들은 집에 귀여운 유래와 놀고 있었다. 분위기는 행복했다. 이야기는 이렇게 시작됩니다. "일생에 학교로 왔을 때 선생님이 저에게 가장 좋아하는 동물이 무엇인지 물었습니다. 그 동물은 힘이나 아름다움으로 알려지지 않았습니다".라고 말했습니다.

story_en:
A children's story.

Once upon a time, there was a children ' s drawing of a tiger and two children standing in front of a door. The main character was children, children are playing with kite in house. The mood was happy.

The story begins:
 "One day when I came to school the teacher asked me what my favourite animal is. My answer that it isn't known for its power nor beauty," said this little boy who just happened at class 1 on his first turn here after getting out of kindergarten without any schooling as well (from those 2 years). But he still wants to become one himself by looking into art books from middle grade onwards."

 - Soham Adnanu
story_final: 어린이들의 이야기. 한때는 어린이들의 그림으로 호랑이와 두 명의 어린이가 문 앞에 서 있었다. 주인공은 아이들이었고, 아이들은 집에 귀여운 유래와 놀고 있었다. 분위기는 행복했다. 이야기는 이렇게 시작됩니다. "일생에 학교로 왔을 때 선생님이 저에게 가장 좋아하는 동물이 무엇인지 물었습니다. 그 동물은 힘이나 아름다움으로 알려지지 않았습니다".라고 말했습니다.
